# ShopSphere

An optimized MERN-stack e-commerce replica platform built with React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Redis, and Socket.io.

## Core Services

- **User Authentication**: Secure signup with Email OTP verification (Nodemailer), Google OAuth integration, and JWT sessions.
- **AI Integration**: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash chatbot with LangChain context windowing for intelligent catalog queries and dynamic multi-language review translations.
- **Performance Optimization**: Distributed Redis caching wrapper with automatic MongoDB fallback, 1-hour TTL, and CRUD-triggered pattern invalidation.
- **Geolocation & Localized Payments**: Automatic user country detection (via ipapi.co/json) routing checkouts (Razorpay domestic checkout with HMAC signature verification vs international card checkout).
- **Real-Time Duplex Communication**: Socket.io user-to-admin support chat rooms with custom MongoDB aggregations for dashboard sorting.

## Main Routes

- `/`: Home page (Product collections slides, categories, promotion banner)
- `/product/:id`: Detailed product page (Add to Cart, Buy Now, Group Buy features, and reviews)
- `/cart`: Checkout basket (Address input, coupon code validation, and payment routing triggers)
- `/orders`: Order history logs
- `/admin`: Seller dashboard (Inventory logs and order status management)
- `/wishlist`: User wishlisted items
- `/profile`: User profiles and shipping addresses
- `/seller/onboarding`: Seller onboarding page

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 19, Redux Toolkit, Material-UI, react-multi-carousel
- Backend: Node.js, Express, mongoose ODM
- Caching: Redis
- WebSockets: Socket.io
- Payments: Razorpay SDK
- AI/LLM: Google Gemini AI SDK
